text_block_list.text:
Hearing Matikanetannhauser's voice, I head to
the training track...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
How was my run just now? My uniqueness shined
through, right? Right?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Appearance: bizarre. Chances of being reported
for suspicious activity: high. Conclusion: subject's
running form exceeds reasonable parameters of
"uniqueness."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, you know... You might end up falling over if
you keep wriggling around when you run...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello! So, um, the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to try running in a unique way so I can
get a bunch of fans!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I was just asking these two for
some advice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I think that... just running normally is probably
better...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. I detect no correlation between
"uniqueness" and successful race performance.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: W-well, just keep watching. I'm sure my next attempt will really be the one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Crabby-crabby!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So? How'd you like my sideways running?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analyzing situation. Implementation in race will
result in immediate disqualification.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what if I close my eyes? I'll just try... running
like this and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Nope! No, no, no! Too scary!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-and dangerous too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Okay, how about I try... running while reading a
book?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Running or walking while distracted is also
prohibited at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... W-wait...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There's just no way this is gonna work, is there?!
How am I supposed to win with such ridiculous
running styles?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Racing is insanely tough! Everyone's trying so hard to be the best!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Judging from your faces... you all figured that out
already. You unique Umamusume really are on a
different level. Urghhh...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Negative. Uniqueness has no bearing on the
realization in question.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm not sure if Tannhauser is listening to what
we're saying...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um... as a professional trainer, can you think of
any other running styles that might leave an
impression on people?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: If you can, please share!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. Coming in first place leaves a lasting
impression, resulting in high memorability.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I think so too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I see. Now that you mention it, that does make
sense, doesn't it? Everyone remembers the
winner...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And that means they'll support me... And I might
even make them happy?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Checking schedule and current training regimen...
Availability confirmed. Perhaps I could do some
partner running with you?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm available too, but um... I just hope nothing
bad happens.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Of course it won't! Aw, thanks so much, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You guys are right... If I focus too hard on being
unique, I won't be able to run properly!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So I'm gonna focus on winning! I'll take first like BLAM! Let's do some partner running together!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa... They're so fast! Wow... Seriously...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I better work extra hard! I'm gonna give it
my all and make it to their level...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Then I'm gonna win! I know I can do it!

More determined than ever, Matikanetannhauser
and her friends keep running right up until curfew.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yep... If you come first, you'll leave an impression
without having to do any weird runs.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: W-weird?! Weird... I guess you're right.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. My calculations also suggest that
your crab walk will only induce disdain in the
audience.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Urk! Okay, okay. Maybe I went a little too far...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: On the other hand, my analysis indicates that your tenacity is your charm, Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I agree. I think that charm catches people's
attention.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was stopping to stare at you just now,
Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Really?!

I look around to see multiple Umamusume staring
at Matikanetannhauser with curious expressions.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No, this isn't what I wanted! Aaagh! This is the
wrong kind of attention!

Matikanetannhauser slumps down on the spot,
exasperated and extremely embarrassed.
